scope: Internal coordinator view: real mentor + student identities with contact info.

matches.rationale: Jane is interested in the Venture Pathway and strengthening her product thinking, user validation, and startup execution skills, with a focus on enterprise tech, AI, and digital health. Nicki Doggart's expertise spans AI & Emerging Tech, Product Development/Design, Entrepreneurship/Venture Creation, and Go-to-market strategy including ICP and story. This pairing directly supports Jane's goals of moving from concept to execution and learning how startups validate ideas with real users.

This pairing aligns with Zach's venture interests and his upcoming work on the AI sports team, offering mentorship in both AI applications and entrepreneurial venture development.

Additionally, Thomas's background in Industry Applications and Entrepreneurship can help Soham navigate the practical development of his communication technology concept.
